Skip to contents
mathmodels 0.0.9
  • Reference
    • Getting Started with mathmodels
    • 📖 User Guide (Online Book)
  • News

SIS Epidemic Model

Source: R/diffEq_models.R
model_sis.Rd

Two-compartment model with recovery but no lasting immunity: $$\frac{dS}{dt} = -\beta S I + \gamma I$$ $$\frac{dI}{dt} = \beta S I - \gamma I$$

Usage

model_sis(init, params, times, ...)

Arguments

init

Named numeric vector, e.g. c(S = 990, I = 10).

params

Named numeric vector, e.g. c(beta = 0.002, gamma = 0.1).

beta

Transmission rate.

gamma

Recovery rate (1/gamma = mean infectious period).

times

Numeric vector of output times.

...

Additional arguments passed to ode_solver.

Value

A data.frame with columns time, S, I.

Details

Population size \(N = S + I\) is conserved.

Examples

model_sis(
  init   = c(S = 990, I = 10),
  params = c(beta = 0.002, gamma = 0.1),
  times  = seq(0, 50, by = 0.1)
)
#>     time         S         I
#> 1    0.0 990.00000  10.00000
#> 2    0.1 987.93408  12.06592
#> 3    0.2 985.44796  14.55204
#> 4    0.3 982.45918  17.54082
#> 5    0.4 978.87040  21.12960
#> 6    0.5 974.56738  25.43262
#> 7    0.6 969.41697  30.58303
#> 8    0.7 963.26495  36.73505
#> 9    0.8 955.93472  44.06528
#> 10   0.9 947.22632  52.77368
#> 11   1.0 936.91676  63.08324
#> 12   1.1 924.76209  75.23791
#> 13   1.2 910.50182  89.49818
#> 14   1.3 893.86666 106.13334
#> 15   1.4 874.59012 125.40988
#> 16   1.5 852.42474 147.57526
#> 17   1.6 827.16287 172.83713
#> 18   1.7 798.66159 201.33841
#> 19   1.8 766.87020 233.12980
#> 20   1.9 731.85690 268.14310
#> 21   2.0 693.83093 306.16907
#> 22   2.1 653.15548 346.84452
#> 23   2.2 610.34668 389.65332
#> 24   2.3 566.05564 433.94436
#> 25   2.4 521.03349 478.96651
#> 26   2.5 476.08254 523.91746
#> 27   2.6 432.00006 567.99994
#> 28   2.7 389.52275 610.47725
#> 29   2.8 349.28003 650.71997
#> 30   2.9 311.76189 688.23811
#> 31   3.0 277.30410 722.69590
#> 32   3.1 246.08988 753.91012
#> 33   3.2 218.16467 781.83533
#> 34   3.3 193.45955 806.54045
#> 35   3.4 171.81837 828.18163
#> 36   3.5 153.02481 846.97519
#> 37   3.6 136.82667 863.17333
#> 38   3.7 122.95593 877.04407
#> 39   3.8 111.14411 888.85589
#> 40   3.9 101.13318 898.86682
#> 41   4.0  92.68259 907.31741
#> 42   4.1  85.57333 914.42667
#> 43   4.2  79.60956 920.39044
#> 44   4.3  74.61868 925.38132
#> 45   4.4  70.45035 929.54965
#> 46   4.5  66.97483 933.02517
#> 47   4.6  64.08103 935.91897
#> 48   4.7  61.67438 938.32562
#> 49   4.8  59.67481 940.32519
#> 50   4.9  58.01480 941.98520
#> 51   5.0  56.63760 943.36240
#> 52   5.1  55.49567 944.50433
